title: [Cloud] Flamingo - Unpairing the charge case from the headset
scenario: Unpairing charge case from Voyager Legend 50 results in headset reconnecting as standalone device without charge case in Poly Studio Mobile app and cloud web page
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the device name (Poly Voyager Legend 50) to open Device Settings.
Navigate to Device Settings → Clear Trusted Device List and confirm the action.
Go to the Home screen and tap the device name again.
Tap Remove Device and confirm removal from the app.
Find Poly Voyager Legend 50 in the paired devices list and tap Forget/Unpair.
Open a web browser and log into the Poly cloud web page (e.g., Poly Lens or Plantronics Manager Pro).
Navigate to the device list and remove the Poly Voyager Legend 50 entry.
Power off the headset by pressing and holding the Power button until the LED turns off.
Power on the headset by pressing and holding the Power button until the LED flashes blue.
Put the headset into pairing mode by pressing and holding the Bluetooth button until the LED alternates red/blue.
On the phone, go to Bluetooth settings and select Poly Voyager Legend 50 to pair.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app; the device should appear on the Home screen as available.
Tap the device name to reconnect and complete setup.
expected: The device reconnects as a standalone headset (without charge case) and appears as "Voyager Legend 50" on the cloud web page with only headset information visible.
